creator: skreuzer@f2o.org
text:
an updated version of grass has been released. The shell archive below bumps the port to 6.2.1

# This is a shell archive.  Save it in a file, remove anything before
# this line, and then unpack it by entering "sh file".  Note, it may
# create directories; files and directories will be owned by you and
# have default permissions.
#
# This archive contains:
#
#	.
#	./Makefile
#	./distinfo
#	./pkg-descr
#	./pkg-plist
#
echo c - .
mkdir -p . > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - ./Makefile
sed 's/^X//' >./Makefile << 'END-of-./Makefile'
X# New ports collection makefile for:	grass
X# Date created:		15 January 2000
X# Whom:			reg
X#
X# $FreeBSD: ports/databases/grass/Makefile,v 1.43 2006/06/12 18:41:13 erwin Exp $
X#
X
XPORTNAME=	grass
XPORTVERSION=	6.2.1
X#PORTEPOCH=	2
XCATEGORIES=	databases
XMASTER_SITES=	http://grass.itc.it/grass62/source/ \
X		ftp://grass.itc.it/pub/grass/grass62/source/ \
X		http://grass.ibiblio.org/grass62/source/\
X		ftp://www.ibiblio.org/pub/packages/gis/grass/grass62/source/\
X		http://www.geog.uni-hannover.de/grass/grass62/source/\
X		http://grass.meteo.uni.wroc.pl/grass62/source/ \
X		http://grass.ru.ac.za/grass62/source/\
X		http://wgrass.media.osaka-cu.ac.jp/grassh/grass62/source/\
X		http://public.planetmirror.com/pub/grass/grass62/source/\
X		ftp://ftp.planetmirror.com/pub/grass/grass62/source/\
X		http://gulus.usherbrooke.ca/pub/appl/grass/grass62/source/\
X		http://ludique.u-bourgogne.fr/grass/grass62/source/
X
XMAINTAINER=	lrntct@gmail.com
XCOMMENT=	An open source Geographical Information System (GIS)
X
XBUILD_DEPENDS=	proj:${PORTSDIR}/graphics/proj \
X		gdal-config:${PORTSDIR}/graphics/gdal \
X		wish8.4:${PORTSDIR}/x11-toolkits/tk84
XRUN_DEPENDS=	proj:${PORTSDIR}/graphics/proj \
X		gdal-config:${PORTSDIR}/graphics/gdal
XLIB_DEPENDS=	tiff.4:${PORTSDIR}/graphics/tiff \
X		png.5:${PORTSDIR}/graphics/png \
X		jpeg.9:${PORTSDIR}/graphics/jpeg \
X		fftw.2:${PORTSDIR}/math/fftw \
X		freetype.9:${PORTSDIR}/print/freetype2
X
XUSE_GMAKE=	yes
XUSE_ICONV=	yes
XUSE_GETTEXT=	yes
XUSE_PERL5=	yes
XUSE_XLIB=	yes
XUSE_FREETYPE=	yes
XUSE_TCL_BUILD=	yes
XUSE_TCL=	yes
XUSE_TK=		yes
XPATCH_TCL_SCRIPTS=lib/init/init.sh
XPATCH_TK_SCRIPTS=lib/init/init.sh
X
XALL_TARGET=
XGNU_CONFIGURE=	yes
XCONFIGURE_ARGS=	--with-includes=${LOCALBASE}/include \
X		--with-libs=${LOCALBASE}/lib \
X		--with-tcltk-includes="${LOCALBASE}/include/tcl8.4 \
X					 ${LOCALBASE}/include/tk8.4" \
X		--with-opengl-includes=${X11BASE}/include \
X		--with-opengl-libs=${X11BASE}/lib \
X		--with-freetype \
X		--with-freetype-includes=${LOCALBASE}/include/freetype2 \
X		--with-nls \
X		--with-cxx \
X		--with-readline \
X		--enable-largefile
X
XPLIST_SUB=	GRASS_INST_DIR=${GRASS_INST_DIR}
XINSTALLS_SHLIB=	yes
XLDCONFIG_DIRS=	%%PREFIX%%/%%GRASS_INST_DIR%%/lib
XUSE_LDCONFIG=	${PREFIX}/${GRASS_INST_DIR}/lib
X
XOPTIONS=	MYSQL "Enable MySQL support" Off \
X		PGSQL "Enable PostgreSQL support" On
X
X.include <bsd.port.pre.mk>
X
X.if ${OSVERSION} < 500000
XPLIST_SUB+=	FBSD4=""
X.else
XPLIST_SUB+=	FBSD4="@comment "
X.endif
X
X.if !defined (GRASS_INST_DIR)
XGRASS_INST_DIR=	${PORTNAME}
X.endif
X
X.if defined(WITH_MYSQL)
XUSE_MYSQL=	yes
XCONFIGURE_ARGS+=--with-mysql \
X		--with-mysql-includes=${LOCALBASE}/include/mysql \
X		--with-mysql-libs=${LOCALBASE}/lib/mysql
XPLIST_SUB+=	MYSQL=""
X.else
XPLIST_SUB+=	MYSQL="@comment "
X.endif
X.if defined(WITHOUT_PGSQL)
XCONFIGURE_ARGS+=--without-postgres
XPLIST_SUB+=	PGSQL="@comment "
X.else
XUSE_PGSQL=	yes
XPLIST_SUB+=	PGSQL=""
X.endif
X
X.include "${PORTSDIR}/misc/ldconfig_compat/bsd.ldconfig.mk"
X
Xpost-extract:
X	@${REINPLACE_CMD} -E '28s|/grass-.*|/${GRASS_INST_DIR}|g' \
X	${WRKSRC}/Makefile
X
Xpost-install: install-ldconfig-file
X
X.include <bsd.port.post.mk>
END-of-./Makefile
echo x - ./distinfo
sed 's/^X//' >./distinfo << 'END-of-./distinfo'
XMD5 (grass-6.2.1.tar.gz) = cbe14d34503a75e8102d2f56c7b527a7

XSIZE (grass-6.2.1.tar.gz) = 12599109
END-of-./distinfo

X          Geographic Resources Analysis Support System
X                           (GRASS GIS)
X
XAn open source Geographical Information System (GIS) with raster,
Xtopological vector, image processing, and graphics production functionality
Xthat operates on various platforms through a graphical user interface and
Xshell in X-Windows. It is released under GNU General Public License (GPL). 
X
XWWW: http://grass.itc.it/
END-of-./pkg-descr

sed 's/^X//' >./pkg-plist << 'END-of-./pkg-plist'
